note: Unregistered directories found by scripts/update_manifest.py scan -- each row is a directory bundle, not a single file (a 'dataset' is usually one export per text/class/period). Review each: decide whether it's really one manifest-worthy asset (bundle several files into one row with a glob/pattern note) or genuine noise to ignore, then add a proper row to datasets.json by hand (or via /findings-append) and delete its entry here. Never auto-merged.
